---
title: "Particles RevealJS"
author: "Roy Francis"
format: revealjs
filters:
  - particles
---

## Default particles

{{< particles >}}

This slide has default particles.

## Custom particles

{{< particles
  style="background-color: #0b1c26"
  particles.number.value=120
  particles.color.value="#55acee"
  particles.line_linked.color="#55acee"
  particles.move.speed=2
  interactivity.events.onhover.mode=grab
  interactivity.modes.grab.distance=250
>}}

Custom blue particles with grab interaction.

## Dense particles

{{< particles
  style="height: 400px; background-color: #1a1a1a"
  particles.number.value=80
  particles.color.value="#ff5733"
  particles.move.speed=10
  interactivity.events.onhover.mode=bubble
  interactivity.modes.bubble.distance=200
>}}

Dense fast-moving red particles.

## No lines

{{< particles
  style="height: 400px; background-color: #FAFAF9"
  particles.number.value=400
  particles.number.density.value_area=100
  particles.color.value="#000000"
  particles.shape.stroke.width=2
  particles.shape.stroke.color="#D4F6F0"
  particles.opacity.random=true
  particles.opacity.anim.enable=true
  particles.opacity.anim.speed=10
  particles.opacity.anim.opacity_min=0
  particles.size.value=2
  particles.size.random=true
  particles.line_linked.enable=false
  particles.move.speed=6
  particles.move.random=true
  interactivity.events.onhover.mode=bubble
  interactivity.events.onclick.enable=false
  interactivity.modes.bubble.size=5
  interactivity.modes.bubble.duration=10
  interactivity.modes.bubble.opacity=0
  interactivity.modes.bubble.speed=3
  interactivity.modes.repulse.distance=400
  retina_detect=true
>}}

Scattered particles without linking lines.

## Plain slide

This slide has no particles — just regular content.
